reviews.review_description: It was fun, I’ll give you that, but, I read it was a Gorilla Tag locomotion game, and when I get in, my stick drift makes me move backwards, I was like “that’s weird, it said this was gorilla tag, not joy stick” my friends got on, they loved the monsters, but they also couldn’t run because of the stick drift, I don’t like the legs, so, I’ll rage 2-3 stars.

reviews.review_title: NO SUPPORT FOR QUEST PRO CONTROLLERS
reviews.review_description: I opened the game and couldn't for because there is no support for quest pro controllers
The stick drift is bad but thats my controller. But i miss thd old experi spe. please bring it back 🙏😫😭
First time I played, I met the owner. They were really nice and the game is really fun and similar to ear game.￼￼ Great horror. great movement. very fun. 5/5
But could you guys make the halls larger and brighter that would be so cool and could you rework the code joining system?
